purpose: Records route-level golden evidence requirements without promoting experimental routes prematurely.

samples.real_fixture_evidence: Real English Hermes Agent tutorial PNG (owner-provided) OCR'd via the project chain: PyMuPDF wraps the PNG as PDF, MinerU OCR (project venv, auto, en) extracts text. Source image and extracted Markdown ship at python/tests/golden/formats/image/ (ocr_sample_en.png + ocr_sample_en.txt) and are content-hash locked (see python/tests/test_image_ocr_fixture.py FIXTURE_IMAGE_SHA256 + FIXTURE_TEXT_SHA256) so any silent drift fails CI until the fixture is regenerated deliberately.

samples.promotion_blocker: Legacy Office is intentionally out of scope (owner declined adaptation); convert to PDF or modern Office (.docx/.pptx/.xlsx) first.

samples.real_fixture_evidence: Real 90s zh audio (YouTube video 3DlXq9nsQOE, public) transcribed via qwen3-asr Qwen3-ASR-1.7B (cuda:0/bfloat16, RTX 4060 Ti); transcript committed at python/tests/golden/formats/media/transcript_zh_90s.txt and content-hash locked (see python/tests/test_media_asr_fixture.py FIXTURE_SHA256) so any silent drift fails CI until the fixture is regenerated deliberately. English Whisper large-v3 route also passed manual acceptance (see docs/development/asr-dual-track-acceptance.md).

samples.promotion_blocker: Real YouTube subtitle fixture now ships (subtitle_en_caQ2pfhoPcs.txt, video CAQ2pfhoPcs en auto subs via yt-dlp); verified promotion still needs broader real-network, timeout, dependency-variance, no-subtitle fallback, and transcript-quality evidence.
samples.real_fixture_evidence: Real YouTube subtitle downloaded via yt-dlp (project wrapper tool) for owner-designated test video CAQ2pfhoPcs (public, 'How I Turned Claude Into My Personal Assistant'); en auto subs cleaned to transcript committed at python/tests/golden/formats/youtube/subtitle_en_caQ2pfhoPcs.txt (1170-character excerpt from a 25166-character full transcript).

samples.promotion_blocker: MOBI is intentionally out of scope; convert to EPUB/PDF/Markdown/text first.
